blur_detection.description: The text and edges are sharp with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or overexposed regions detected.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration observed.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds detected.

cut_off_detection.description: No cut-off edges or excluded document portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete content.

obstructions.description: No obstructions, shadows, or other elements blocking content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, and item description. It is classified as a meal expense due to the nature of the items purchased (cappuccino). However, the location of the document is Japan, which does not match the expected location of Indonesia.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 schema fields, including supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, and item description line items. This meets the criteria for being classified as an expense document.

extraction.supplier_address: 成田空港第1ターミナル第2サテライト店

issues.description: Missing mandatory customer name on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show vendor name or merchant name that provided goods/services

issues.description: Missing mandatory invoice number on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show purchase date when transaction occurred

issues.description: Personal meals during business trip are taxable BIK - subject to gross-up
issues.recommendation: Personal meals during business trip are taxable BIK - subject to gross-up. Business lunch/entertainment with client/prospect client/vendor is non-taxable
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Personal meals during business trip are taxable BIK - subject to gross-up. Business lunch/entertainment with client/prospect client/vendor is non-taxable

issues.description: Name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor must be provided
issues.recommendation: Please provide the name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor must be provided

issues.description: Expense submissions must have an itemized report along with clear receipts - properly labeled receipts for identification
issues.recommendation: Please ensure that expense submissions include an itemized report along with clear, properly labeled receipts for identification
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expense submissions must have an itemized report along with clear receipts - properly labeled receipts for identification

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing mandatory fields such as customer name and invoice number. Additionally, there are tax implications for personal meals during business trips which are subject to gross-up. Further, additional information such as the name of clients/vendor for business meals and properly labeled receipts are required.
